meta.title: Events
meta.intro: Events gather the guild around posted times, goals & RSVP notes so runs feel calm instead of rushed.
badges: RSVP in Discord when planning is needed

featured.lead: Featured activities show where the guild is gathering, from welcoming members to helping friends prepare for trials.
featured.title: Skill building & Mentoring
bullets: When slots allow, we welcome members & help each player find a place in Mōchirīī.
Check Discord for final timing, requirements & party assignments before events.

upcoming.title: Guild Hero's Realm: Weekly Coordination
upcoming.summary: A weekly Friday window for the guild hero's realm. Show up, ask questions & we'll match groups together.

upcoming.title: United Resolve
upcoming.summary: A Friday guild window for members gathering after Hero's Realm.

recurring.intro: Recurring activities happen as schedules allow. Discord carries final timing; the site keeps the rhythm clear.

items.title: Sect dailies, guild activities, trials, hero realms & more.
items.summary: Posted windows help members gather, form teams & keep teams running smoothly.

participation.title: How to participate
participation.body: All members are welcome. RSVP in Discord or the in-game guild event when planning is needed. Showing up on time helps leaders form groups & keeps runs smooth for everyone.
